But I found a plant called "Hepatica" that is a small perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. Here is a paragraph about the plant Hepatica:

Hepatica is a small perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and inflammation, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Hepatica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoid glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Hepatica is typically made into a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to treat a range of health issues, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
